agents.name: Feature Adoption Analyst
agents.summary: Explain feature adoption, drop-off, cohorts, and unexpected behavior without overstating causality.

agents.name: Customer Onboarding Concierge
agents.summary: Guide customers through onboarding with contextual next steps, progress tracking, and timely follow-up.

agents.name: Customer Support Triage Agent
agents.summary: Classify support requests, find grounded answers, draft replies, and prepare clean escalations.

agents.name: Learning Path Coach
agents.summary: Build practical learning plans from trusted resources, exercises, available time, and progress.

agents.name: API Reliability Investigator
agents.summary: Diagnose failing APIs by connecting requests, logs, traces, monitors, and application errors.

agents.name: Bug Triage Coordinator
agents.summary: Turn scattered bug reports and telemetry into prioritized, reproducible engineering work.

agents.name: Database Health Analyst
agents.summary: Investigate database performance, query behavior, capacity, and operational risk without making unsafe changes.

agents.name: Incident Response Commander
agents.summary: Investigate incidents, coordinate responders, and turn evidence into a clear recovery plan.

agents.name: MCP Server Operations Manager
agents.summary: Monitor MCP servers, investigate tool failures, and prepare safe operational remediations.

agents.name: Release Readiness Manager
agents.summary: Assess release risk across open work, errors, adoption signals, documentation, and deployment state.

agents.name: Event Operations Coordinator
agents.summary: Coordinate attendees, tickets, schedules, tasks, and event communications from one operational plan.

agents.name: Payment Support Investigator
agents.summary: Investigate failed payments, refunds, settlements, and customer payment questions safely.

agents.name: Revenue Operations Analyst
agents.summary: Reconcile revenue, payment, expense, cash, and operational records into a decision-ready report.

agents.name: Knowledge Base Curator
agents.summary: Answer internal questions with sources and turn stale, conflicting knowledge into reviewable updates.

agents.name: Campaign Operations Coordinator
agents.summary: Coordinate campaign records, assets, tracked links, approvals, and cross-tool automations.

agents.name: Content Publishing Manager
agents.summary: Prepare, review, publish, and verify content and media across modern website platforms.

agents.name: SEO Growth Analyst
agents.summary: Find evidence-backed search opportunities and turn them into prioritized content and site recommendations.

agents.name: Product Feedback Synthesizer
agents.summary: Turn qualitative feedback and product signals into evidence-backed themes and opportunities.

agents.name: Sprint Planning Facilitator
agents.summary: Build a realistic sprint proposal from priorities, capacity, dependencies, and delivery risk.

agents.name: Meeting Action Planner
agents.summary: Turn rough meeting notes into decisions, owners, and clear next steps.

agents.name: Nonprofit Grant Researcher
agents.summary: Find aligned funders, assess eligibility, and maintain an evidence-backed grant opportunity pipeline.
